    uid=2_308 StaticText "* SWE-Bench Series: Internal agent scaffold (bash + file-edit tools); temp=1.0, top_p=0.95, 200K context window. We correct some problematic tasks in the public set of SWE-bench Pro and evaluate all baselines on the refined benchmark."
    uid=2_309 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_310 StaticText "* Terminal-Bench 2.0: Harbor/Terminus-2 harness; 3h timeout, 32 CPU/48 GB RAM; temp=1.0, top_p=0.95, top_k=20, max_tokens=80K, 256K ctx; avg of 5 runs."
    uid=2_311 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_312 StaticText "* SkillsBench: Evaluated via OpenCode on 78 tasks (self-contained subset, excluding API-dependent tasks); avg of 5 runs."
    uid=2_313 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_314 StaticText "* NL2Repo: Others are evaluated via Claude Code (temp=1.0, top_p=0.95, max_turns=900)."
    uid=2_315 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_316 StaticText "* QwenClawBench: An internal real-user-distribution Claw agent benchmark (open-sourcing soon); temp=0.6, 256K ctx."
    uid=2_317 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_318 StaticText "* QwenWebBench: An internal front-end code generation benchmark; bilingual (EN/CN), 7 categories (Web Design, Web Apps, Games, SVG, Data Visualization, Animation, and 3D); auto-render + multimodal judge (code/visual correctness); BT/Elo rating system."
    uid=2_319 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_320 StaticText "* TAU3-Bench: We use the official user model (gpt-5.2, low reasoning effort) + default BM25 retrieval."
    uid=2_321 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_322 StaticText "* VITA-Bench: Avg subdomain scores; using claude-4-sonnet as judger, as the official judger (claude-3.7-sonnet) is no longer available."
    uid=2_323 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_324 StaticText "* MCPMark: GitHub MCP v0.30.3; Playwright responses truncated at 32K tokens."
    uid=2_325 LineBreak "
"
    uid=2_326 StaticText "* MCP-Atlas: Public set score; gemini-2.5-pro judger."
    uid=2_327 LineBreak "
"

    uid=2_502 StaticText "Quickstart"
    uid=2_503 StaticText "For streamlined integration, we recommend using Qwen3.6 via APIs. Below is a guide to use Qwen3.6 via OpenAI-compatible API."
    uid=2_504 link url="https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-GGUF?show_file_info=Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-IQ4_XS.gguf#serving-qwen36"
    uid=2_505 StaticText "Serving Qwen3.6"
    uid=2_506 StaticText "Qwen3.6 can be served via APIs with popular inference frameworks. In the following, we show example commands to launch OpenAI-Compatible API servers for Qwen3.6 models."
    uid=2_507 StaticText "Inference efficiency and throughput vary significantly across frameworks. We recommend using the latest framework versions to ensure optimal performance and compatibility. For production workloads or high-throughput scenarios, dedicated serving engines such as SGLang, KTransformers or vLLM are strongly recommended."
    uid=2_508 StaticText "The model has a default context length of 262,144 tokens. If you encounter out-of-memory (OOM) errors, consider reducing the context window. However, because Qwen3.6 leverages extended context for complex tasks, we advise maintaining a context length of at least 128K tokens to preserve thinking capabilities."
    uid=2_509 link url="https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-GGUF?show_file_info=Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-IQ4_XS.gguf#sglang"
    uid=2_510 StaticText "SGLang"
    uid=2_511 link "SGLang" url="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang"
      uid=2_512 StaticText "SGLang"
    uid=2_513 StaticText " is a fast serving framework for large language models and vision language models. "
    uid=2_514 StaticText "sglang>=0.5.10"
    uid=2_515 StaticText " is recommended for Qwen3.6, which can be installed using the following command in a fresh environment:"
    uid=2_516 StaticText "uv pip install sglang[all]
"
    uid=2_517 button
    uid=2_518 StaticText "See "
    uid=2_519 link "its documentation" url="https://docs.sglang.ai/get_started/install.html"
      uid=2_520 StaticText "its documentation"
    uid=2_521 StaticText " for more details."
    uid=2_522 StaticText "The following will create API endpoints at "
    uid=2_523 StaticText "http://localhost:8000/v1"
    uid=2_524 StaticText ":"
    uid=2_525 StaticText "Standard Version"
    uid=2_526 StaticText ": The following command can be used to create an API endpoint with maximum context length 262,144 tokens using tensor parallel on 8 GPUs."
    uid=2_527 StaticText "python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B --port 8000 --tp-size 8 --mem-fraction-static 0.8 --context-length 262144 --reasoning-parser qwen3
"
    uid=2_528 button
    uid=2_529 StaticText "Tool Use"
    uid=2_530 StaticText ": To support tool use, you can use the following command."
    uid=2_531 StaticText "python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B --port 8000 --tp-size 8 --mem-fraction-static 0.8 --context-length 262144 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder
"
    uid=2_532 button
    uid=2_533 StaticText "Multi-Token Prediction (MTP)"
    uid=2_534 StaticText ": The following command is recommended for MTP:"
    uid=2_535 StaticText "python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B --port 8000 --tp-size 8 --mem-fraction-static 0.8 --context-length 262144 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --speculative-algo NEXTN --speculative-num-steps 3 --speculative-eagle-topk 1 --speculative-num-draft-tokens 4
"
    uid=2_536 button
    uid=2_537 StaticText "For detailed deployment guide, see the "

      uid=2_539 StaticText "SGLang Qwen3.5 Cookbook"

    uid=2_542 StaticText "vLLM"
    uid=2_543 link "vLLM" url="https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm"
      uid=2_544 StaticText "vLLM"
    uid=2_545 StaticText " is a high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs. "
    uid=2_546 StaticText "vllm>=0.19.0"
    uid=2_547 StaticText " is recommended for Qwen3.6, which can be installed using the following command in a fresh environment:"
    uid=2_548 StaticText "uv pip install vllm --torch-backend=auto
"
    uid=2_549 button
    uid=2_550 StaticText "See "
    uid=2_551 link "its documentation" url="https://docs.vllm.ai/en/stable/getting_started/installation/index.html"
      uid=2_552 StaticText "its documentation"
    uid=2_553 StaticText " for more details."
    uid=2_554 StaticText "The following will create API endpoints at "
    uid=2_555 StaticText "http://localhost:8000/v1"
    uid=2_556 StaticText ":"
    uid=2_557 StaticText "Standard Version"
    uid=2_558 StaticText ": The following command can be used to create an API endpoint with maximum context length 262,144 tokens using tensor parallel on 8 GPUs."
    uid=2_559 StaticText "vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B --port 8000 --tensor-parallel-size 8 --max-model-len 262144 --reasoning-parser qwen3 
"
    uid=2_560 button
    uid=2_561 StaticText "Tool Call"
    uid=2_562 StaticText ": To support tool use, you can use the following command."
    uid=2_563 StaticText "vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B --port 8000 --tensor-parallel-size 8 --max-model-len 262144 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder 
"
    uid=2_564 button
    uid=2_565 StaticText "Multi-Token Prediction (MTP)"
    uid=2_566 StaticText ": The following command is recommended for MTP:"
    uid=2_567 StaticText "vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B --port 8000 --tensor-parallel-size 8 --max-model-len 262144 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --speculative-config '{"method":"qwen3_next_mtp","num_speculative_tokens":2}'
"

    uid=2_569 StaticText "Text-Only"

    uid=2_587 StaticText "Hugging Face Transformers contains a "
